creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
I committed a patch for #184507 and want to change its state to "Needs MFC".  It is currently in the "Commit ready" state.  The only options available in the pulldown are "Needs Help" and "Issue Resolved".

Note that the workflow diagram does not include the "In Discussion" state, which seems to be (one of) the most common, and that the status pulldown does not include the "Assigned" state which is present in the diagram.
